summary: Iteration 2 full regression + redesign validation for Sadhna Dhiman coaching site. Backend: 5/5 pytest tests pass. Frontend desktop (1440x900): all 12 checks pass — page transition curtain resolves in <2s, hero heading visible, 'Explore Services' CTA fully removed (0 by testid AND 0 by text /Explore Services/i), only Book Consultation remains, body backgroundColor is exactly rgb(239, 227, 210) matching new warm-beige palette, nav 'Voices' label rendered with data-testid nav-link-testimonials preserved, sticky navbar morphs on scroll, nav Book Consultation calls window.open→calendly, all 8 service cards present, stats section renders animated numbers (1,200+, 16 yrs, 7.5+, 85+, 96%, 4), testimonials prev/next crossfade swaps quote text, all 6 FAQ items expand/collapse via data-state toggle, footer email+linkedin+book links correct, contact-calendly-btn triggers window.open. Mobile (390x844): mobile toggle visible, opens overlay with all 6 mobile-nav-link-* + Book Consultation, clicking a link closes overlay and scrolls page (~2453px). Hero heading font-size 44px (>40 requirement), Book CTA is full-width (350/390px), services stack single column. Contact form end-to-end on mobile: fill name/email/exam via shadcn Select role='option'/message → success toast 'Thank you — your message is with Sadhna' shown, GET /api/inquiries confirms persistence. Strict privacy holds: phone '7986498916' and 'Ma\'am' both absent from DOM on both viewports. 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Info-only: stats numbers render with locale comma (e.g. '1,200+'); any downstream test asserting bare '1200' should match with comma or strip separators.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — non-blocking, but consider lifespan context manager migration.
GET /api/inquiries remains unauthenticated with 1000 doc cap — acceptable for MVP, protect before production.
seed_data_creation: Extra TEST_UI_* / TEST_User_* inquiries created in db.inquiries during pytest and Playwright runs. Harmless; pruneable by name prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Palette check: getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor === 'rgb(239, 227, 210)'. Page transition adds ~0.9s curtain — always wait_for_timeout(1800-2000) after page.goto. Shadcn Select options render in a portal — use page.get_by_role('option', name=...) NOT text= selector (IELTS text appears in services grid and nav too). FAQ testid is on wrapper — assert data-state closed<->open, not aria-expanded. Frontend uses window.open (not target=_blank) — intercept window.open before clicking Book Consultation buttons. Nav 'Voices' label with data-testid nav-link-testimonials is intentional.
rca of the issue: None — no bugs found. All redesign requirements (palette swap, Framer-Motion animations, Explore Services removal, Voices label, mobile menu, animated count-up stats, mobile-first hero) implemented correctly and all prior regression checks continue to pass.
